'''Tor Difusal''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a member of the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]], the leading body of the Order.

==Biography==
[[Jedi training/Legends|Trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], the [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] Tor Difusal eventually attained the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Distinguished from his peers, Master Difusal was selected to sit on the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] by [[89 BBY]], joining eleven other esteemed members on the august body. Sitting alongside such luminaries as [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] and [[Oppo Rancisis/Legends|Oppo Rancisis]], Difusal was a vocal member of the Council, interjecting comments while Master Yoda spoke. Master Difusal was present during the trial of [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] and [[Lorian Nod]].<ref name="LOTJ" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Jedi]]'' {{1st}}
